title: Weekly Fragrance Popularity Snapshot
description: The integration contract between the collector and any consuming app. One file per ISO week. This schema is versioned; bump schema_version on any breaking change.

schema_version.description: Semantic-ish version of THIS contract. Consumers should check this.

week.description: ISO week the snapshot covers, e.g. 2026-W24.

generated_at.description: UTC timestamp the snapshot was produced.

sources_used.description: Which source modules successfully contributed. Lets the consumer know if a week is degraded (e.g. one source was down).

fragrances.description: Ranked list, rank 1 = most popular this week.

id.description: Stable slug for joining to your app's catalog, e.g. 'chanel-coco-mademoiselle'. Keep this stable across weeks.

score.description: Blended 0-100 popularity score, normalized across the sources that ran this week.

rank_change.description: Positions gained (+) or lost (-) vs last week. null = new entry or no prior week.

signals.description: Per-source raw contributions, for transparency/debugging. Keys match sources_used.

retailer_bestsellers.description: Best (lowest) bestseller rank seen across retailers.
